pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-K-005 (Core Abilities/Knowledge) scores 0.407 composite (highest: NICE at 0.407) and is in_scope for the Knowledge Manager role. Domain prior: edge. Core signal hits: 2. OOS hits: 0. Seniority is appropriate for manager-level Knowledge Manager.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.challenge: Include for edge domain (Core Abilities) at composite 0.407. Edge domain inclusion threshold is ≥0.42 for Knowledge Manager.
pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: Overturned to exclude. Edge domain (Core Abilities) inclusion requires composite ≥0.42; 0.407 is below threshold. Revised to exclude.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence challenge the exclusion of this Core Abilities KSA (composite 0.407)?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Market analysis of Knowledge Manager job postings does not surface this Core Abilities competency as a standard requirement at the relevant level. Exclusion consistent with role focus.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Exclusion upheld. Market evidence consistent with exclusion. Final decision: exclude.
